channel.title: Life on Building, Breaking, Learning
channel.description: Recent content in Life on Building, Breaking, Learning

item.title: Welcome To My Blog
item.description:
Welcome 👋

Thank you very much for taking the time to visit this website. This site is my personal blog, where I share experiences, lessons learned, and various things I encounter in my daily work in the world of System Administration and Information Technology (IT).

Here, I write about topics ranging from troubleshooting, system configuration, networking, and servers, to technical notes that I hope can serve as references and learning materials for others.

About Me

My name is Danu, and I am from Bekasi, Indonesia. My interest in the IT field drives me to continuously learn and explore various technologies, especially those related to systems, networking, and infrastructure.

Through this blog, I aim to document my experiences and share knowledge based on real-world practice and hands-on experience in the field.

Purpose of This Blog

I hope that every article on this website can provide:

  • Useful insights
  • Practical solutions
  • Helpful references for readers

If you have any questions, would like to discuss a topic, or want to share feedback, feel free to contact me via email:

📧 dowithsudo@gmail.com

Closing

Once again, thank you for visiting my website. I hope the content here is useful and encourages you to come back again.

Happy reading! 🚀
